**First multi-agent release.** Native adapters for **OpenAI Codex** (CLI + Cloud) and **Google Gemini** (CLI + Code Assist) alongside the existing Claude Code plugin. Same 11-step workflow, same templates, same SMART validation — different entry-point per agent.

## What's new

- **Codex adapter** — `AGENTS.md` snippet + project-local `WORKFLOW.md`. Loads automatically on Codex CLI / Codex Cloud when trigger phrases hit.
- **Gemini adapter** — `GEMINI.md` snippet + project-local `WORKFLOW.md`. Loads automatically on Gemini CLI / Code Assist when trigger phrases hit.
- **Agent-agnostic workflow** (`adapters/WORKFLOW.md`) — de-Claude'd version of `SKILL.md`. `AskUserQuestion` swapped for explicit prompts; MCP tool names made generic so the workflow uses whichever Figma / Pencil / Notion MCPs each agent has configured.
- **One-command install** — `./adapters/install.sh codex|gemini <project>` vendors workflow + references + templates into your project and wires up the entry file with an idempotent marker block. Re-run any time to pull upstream updates.

## Why

Teams rarely standardize on one AI coding agent across an org. Engineering uses Claude Code, product uses Codex, design uses Gemini Code Assist — and the gap between "we have a great way to break down epics in Claude" and "everyone on the team uses it" was big enough that the skill stopped at one provider's surface. v0.4 closes that gap so the same epic-decomposition discipline travels with the team, not the tool.

## Install

**Claude Code** (unchanged):

```
/plugin marketplace add unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs
/plugin install epic-to-feature-specs@epic-to-feature-specs
```

**Codex** (new):

```
git clone https://github.com/unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs.git
cd epic-to-feature-specs
./adapters/install.sh codex /path/to/your/project
```

**Gemini** (new):

```
git clone https://github.com/unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs.git
cd epic-to-feature-specs
./adapters/install.sh gemini /path/to/your/project
```

See [`adapters/codex/INSTALL.md`](https://github.com/unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs/blob/main/adapters/codex/INSTALL.md) and [`adapters/gemini/INSTALL.md`](https://github.com/unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs/blob/main/adapters/gemini/INSTALL.md) for manual install + troubleshooting.

## Breaking changes

None. The Claude plugin payload (`SKILL.md`, references, templates, hooks) is unchanged from v0.3.1. Existing installs see no behavior difference. The new `adapters/` folder is a separate distribution path; it is **not** bundled into the `.plugin` archive.

## Full writeup

See [`RELEASE_NOTES_v0.4.0.md`](https://github.com/unknown-studio-dev/epic-to-feature-specs/blob/main/RELEASE_NOTES_v0.4.0.md) for design rationale, the full feature comparison across all three agents, what's deliberately out of scope, and what's next.
